issues.description: Power boost duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'during this turn' which means the boost lasts for the current turn only, not until end of turn.
Second effect (Trigger with +1000 power boost) has no basis in card text. The card only describes one effect: power boost and K.O. This second trigger effect should be removed entirely.
Target should allow Leader or Character ('ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter'), not just Character. Card text says 'your Leader or Character cards'.
